text: FastAPI (Sebastian Ramirez, 2018) is a modern Python web framework for building APIs, emphasizing speed and automatic OpenAPI docs. Built on Starlette (web) and Pydantic (data validation). Async support native. Automatic interactive API docs (Swagger UI + ReDoc). One of the fastest-growing Python frameworks.

FastAPI (Sebastian Ramirez, 2018) is a modern Python web framework for building APIs, emphasizing speed and automatic OpenAPI docs. Built on Starlette (web) and Pydantic (data validation). Async support native. Automatic interactive API docs (Swagger UI + ReDoc). One of the fastest-growing Python frameworks.
